Bash(\\
  DATABASE_URL="mysql+aiomysql://x:x@localhost/x" \\
  REDIS_URL="redis://localhost" \\
  MINIO_ENDPOINT="localhost:9000" \\
  MINIO_ACCESS_KEY="x" MINIO_SECRET_KEY="x" \\
  JWT_SECRET_KEY="xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx" \\
  .venv/bin/python - << 'PYEOF'
import asyncio
from app.services.parser.base import ParsedDocument, TextBlock, TableBlock, BlockType, BaseParser
from app.services.parser.docx_parser import DocxParser
from app.services.parser.txt_parser import TxtParser
from app.services.parser.dispatcher import dispatch_parse, _parsers
from app.models.document import FileType

# 验证解析器注册
assert FileType.DOCX in _parsers
assert FileType.TXT in _parsers
assert FileType.PDF in _parsers
print\("parsers registered OK"\)

# 测试 TXT 解析
async def test_txt\(\):
    content = "第一章 总则\\n本规程适用于炼钢工序。\\n1. 适用范围\\n1.1 具体条款。\\n一、安全要求\\n操作人员须持证上岗。"
    txt_bytes = content.encode\("utf-8"\)
    parser = TxtParser\(\)
    result = await parser.parse\(txt_bytes, "test.txt"\)
    print\("TXT blocks:", len\(result.blocks\)\)
    headings = [b.text for b in result.get_text_blocks\(\) if b.level > 0]
    print\("TXT headings:", headings\)
    assert result.meta.file_type == "txt"
    assert len\(result.blocks\) > 0
    assert result.raw_text
    assert len\(headings\) >= 2
    print\("TXT parse OK"\)

asyncio.run\(test_txt\(\)\)

# 测试 DOCX 解析（最小文档）
async def test_docx\(\):
    import io
    from docx import Document as DocxDoc
    buf = io.BytesIO\(\)
    d = DocxDoc\(\)
    d.add_heading\("总则", level=1\)
    d.add_paragraph\("本规程适用范围。"\)
    d.add_heading\("适用范围", level=2\)
    d.add_paragraph\("炼钢工序适用。"\)
    d.save\(buf\)
    parser = DocxParser\(\)
    result = await parser.parse\(buf.getvalue\(\), "test.docx"\)
    print\("DOCX blocks:", len\(result.blocks\)\)
    headings = [b.text for b in result.get_text_blocks\(\) if b.level > 0]
    print\("DOCX headings:", headings\)
    assert len\(headings\) >= 1
    print\("DOCX parse OK"\)

asyncio.run\(test_docx\(\)\)

# 验证 _build_raw_text
class _Dummy\(BaseParser\):
    async def parse\(self, c, f\): pass
raw = _Dummy\(\)._build_raw_text\([
    TextBlock\(BlockType.PARAGRAPH, "hello", index=0\),
    TableBlock\([["a","b"],["c","d"]], index=1\),
]\)
assert "hello" in raw and "a | b" in raw
print\("_build_raw_text OK"\)

print\("ALL OK"\)
PYEOF21)

Bash(\\
  DATABASE_URL="mysql+aiomysql://x:x@localhost/x" \\
  REDIS_URL="redis://localhost" \\
  MINIO_ENDPOINT="localhost:9000" \\
  MINIO_ACCESS_KEY="x" MINIO_SECRET_KEY="x" \\
  JWT_SECRET_KEY="xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx" \\
  .venv/bin/python - << 'PYEOF'
import asyncio, io, pdfplumber
from reportlab.pdfgen import canvas
from reportlab.lib.pagesizes import A4
from app.services.parser.pdf_parser import PdfParser

p = PdfParser\(\)

# --- 1. 标题检测 ---
assert p._detect_heading_level\("第一章 总则"\) == 1
assert p._detect_heading_level\("1 适用范围"\) == 2
assert p._detect_heading_level\("1.1 具体条款"\) == 3
assert p._detect_heading_level\("一、安全要求"\) == 2
assert p._detect_heading_level\("普通段落"\) == 0
print\("heading detection OK"\)

# --- 2. 行分组 + 表格过滤 ---
words = [
    {"text": "第一章", "x0": 72, "top": 100, "x1": 100, "bottom": 112},
    {"text": "总则",   "x0": 105,"top": 100, "x1": 120, "bottom": 112},
    {"text": "本规程", "x0": 72, "top": 120, "x1": 100, "bottom": 132},
    {"text": "表内词", "x0": 200,"top": 200, "x1": 230, "bottom": 212},
]
lines = p._group_words_to_lines\(words, [\(190,190,240,220\)]\)
assert lines == ["第一章 总则", "本规程"], f"got: {lines}"
print\("line grouping + table filter OK"\)

# --- 3. 密度检测 ---
def make_pdf\(num_lines: int\) -> bytes:
    buf = io.BytesIO\(\)
    c = canvas.Canvas\(buf, pagesize=A4\)
    c.setFont\("Helvetica", 11\)
    for i, y in enumerate\(range\(720, 100, -18\)\):
        if i >= num_lines:
            break
        c.drawString\(72, y, "Sample text line with enough characters for density test. " * 2\)
    c.showPage\(\)
    c.save\(\)
    return buf.getvalue\(\)

pdf_dense = pdfplumber.open\(io.BytesIO\(make_pdf\(35\)\)\)
assert not p._is_scanned\(pdf_dense\), "dense PDF should not be scanned"
pdf_dense.close\(\)

pdf_empty = pdfplumber.open\(io.BytesIO\(make_pdf\(0\)\)\)
assert p._is_scanned\(pdf_empty\), "empty PDF should be detected as scanned"
pdf_empty.close\(\)
print\("scanned detection OK"\)

# --- 4. 全流程 ---
async def test_full\(\):
    result = await p.parse\(make_pdf\(35\), "test.pdf"\)
    assert result.meta.file_type == "pdf"
    assert result.meta.page_count == 1
    assert len\(result.blocks\) > 0
    assert result.raw_text
    print\(f"full parse OK: {len\(result.blocks\)} blocks, {result.meta.word_count} chars"\)

asyncio.run\(test_full\(\)\)
print\("ALL OK"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(PYTHONPATH=/home/laigang/laigangai/backend .venv/bin/python3 -c "
from app.services.desensitizer import get_desensitizer

d = get_desensitizer\(\)

cases = [
    \('人民币1,500万元',    '人民币[金额]'\),
    \('￥2000元',           '￥[金额]'\),
    \('合同金额5000万元',   '[金额]'\),
    \('13812345678',        '[联系方式]'\),
    \('110101199001011234', '[证件号]'\),
    \('6222021234567890',   '[银行账号]'\),
    \('test@example.com',   '[邮箱]'\),
    \('192.168.1.1',        '[内网地址]'\),
    \('HT-2026-001234',     '[合同编号]'\),
    \('莱钢集团协议',       '[企业名称]'\),
    \('甲方代表：李四',     '[姓名]'\),
]

for text, expected in cases:
    r = d.desensitize\(text\)
    assert expected in r.text, f'FAIL: {text!r} -> {r.text!r} \(expected {expected!r}\)'
    print\(f'OK: {text!r} -> {r.text!r}'\)
print\('All passed'\)
")
